zh.lifeSummary: 當William Sothern於大約1440年出生在英國越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾時，他的父親Christopher Sotheron26歲，母親Constance Lambert22歲。他於1462年與Alice Spalding在英國越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1509年4月2日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Sothern于大约1440年出生在英国越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾时，他的父亲Christopher Sotheron26岁，母亲Constance Lambert22岁。他于1462年与Alice Spalding在英国越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1509年4月2日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Sothern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Southern
meanings: English (Lancashire): nickname from Middle English s(o)uthern(e), sothron ‘southern’ (Old English sūtherne, Old Norse suthrænn), for someone ‘from the south’, particularly as a northern English nickname for someone from the south of the country and as a Scottish nickname for an Englishman.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Sothern was born about 1440, in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England, his father, Christopher Sotheron, was 26 and his mother, Constance Lambert, was 22. He married Alice Spalding in 1462, in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 2 April 1509, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Sothern est né environ 1440, à Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Christopher Sotheron, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Constance Lambert, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alice Spalding en 1462, à Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 avril 1509, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Sothern um 1440 in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher Sotheron 26 und seine Mutter Constance Lambert 22. Er hat 1462 in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England Alice Spalding geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. April 1509 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Alice Spalding nel 1462, nel Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: William Sothernが約1440年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールメ-オン-スプアルディング-モオルで生まれた時，父Christopher Sotheronは26歳，母Constance Lambertは22歳であった。1462年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールメ-オン-スプアルディング-モオルでAlice Spaldingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1509年4月2日に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアホールメ-オン-スプアルディング-モオルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Sothern(이)가 대략 1440년 영국 요르크실르 홀--스팔딩-모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher Sotheron(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance Lambert(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1462년 영국 요르크실르 홀--스팔딩-모어에서 Alice Spalding(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1509년 4월 2일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 홀--스팔딩-모어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Sothern nasceu aproximadamente 1440, em Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Christopher Sotheron, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Constance Lambert, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Spalding em 1462, em Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de abril de 1509, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Sothern родился около 1440 г. в местности холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Christopher Sotheron было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance Lambert, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Spalding в 1462 г. в местности холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 2 апреля 1509 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Alice Spalding en 1462, en Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de abril de 1509, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
